arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester United vs. Southampton injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Thursday's Premier League clash between Manchester United and Southampton.

arts.ttl: Nuno Mendes salary demands as Manchester United pursue wing back
arts.sum: Manchester United are interested in Paris Saint-Germain ’s Nuno Mendes amidst a breakdown in contract talks between PSG and their left-back. They will continue to try and negotiate a new deal with Mendes, and they know it's in their favour that Manchester United are highly unlikely to play Champions League football next year.

arts.ttl: Barcelona ‘pushing’ attacker out to make room for Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona have begun actively pushing an out-of-favour member of the club’s attacking ranks towards an exit. That’s according to Relevo, who point towards Ansu…

arts.ttl: Former Manchester United winger eyed by MLS side in ambitious move
arts.sum: The 32-year-old has played 4 times so far this season, and is yet to record a goal or an assist. For the final two games of the competition, played in November and December, Zaha failed to make the squad.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville reveals why he believes Marcus Rashford and Alejandro Garnacho could both leave Man United this month as Ruben Amorim looks to remould his squad
arts.sum: Gary Neville believes Marcus Rashford and Alejandro Garnacho could both be sold by Man United this January as part of Ruben Amorim's bid to take control of the club.

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Southampton - Premier League
arts.sum: Predicting Manchester United's starting lineup for their Premier League clash against Southampton on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Transfer News Today: Rashford D-DAY, Spurs WANT Garnacho, new €40m TARGET
arts.sum: Former Manchester United star Dwight Yorke has told the Red Devils to spend big to sign Jude Bellingham from Real Madrid and send a message to their Premier League in the process. Man Utd Transfer News Today: Rashford D-DAY, Spurs WANT Garnacho, new €40m TARGET

arts.ttl: Jesse Lingard given new role as ex-Man Utd star's position with club becomes clear
arts.sum: Jesse Lingard has been confirmed as the new skipper of FC Seoul with the ex-Manchester United man continuing to grow in stature in South Korea after his surprise move

arts.ttl: Napoli start work on move for Manchester United's Alejandro Garnacho
arts.sum: The 20-year-old as been identified as a replacement for the departing Kvicha Kvaratskhelia

arts.ttl: ‘Runs all day’ - Man United’s exciting message about £42m target as Rasmus Hojlund replaced
arts.sum: Manchester United, Liverpool and Chelsea have all been linked with one youngster that's caught the eye of Ruben Amorim - and Rasmus Hojlund has also had his say
